_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Dr. Robotnik's Ring Racers
author: your@email.com
description:
Dr. Robotnik's Ring Racers (v2.4) dedicated server using a custom Pterodactyl-compatible Docker image. Game binary and all data files are baked into the image.

Includes a built-in nginx file server for automatic mod downloads. Place addons in the addons/ subdirectories (chars/, tracks/, loadfirst/, loadlast/). Mods are loaded automatically in the correct order by the entrypoint script.

Requires two port allocations: one for the game (UDP) and one for the mod file server (TCP).

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your Ring Racers server as it appears in the server browser and in-game.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server (2-16). Ring Racers plays best with 8 or fewer players.

variables.name: HTTP Port
variables.description: Port for the built-in mod file server. Must be a second port allocated to this server in Pterodactyl. Players' clients will download mods from this port via the HTTP_SOURCE URL.

variables.name: HTTP Source URL
variables.description: Public URL where clients download mods from. Should point to your reverse proxy or public IP exposing the mod file server, e.g. http://rr.yourdomain.com/repo. Leave blank to disable automatic mod downloads.

variables.name: Extra Launch Parameters
variables.description: Optional additional arguments passed to ringracers at startup. Examples: +kartspeed 1, +map MAP01, +password mypassword
